title: Dortmanna thermalis
intro: Dortmanna thermalis, also known as Dorsman's bladderwort or Dortmann's bladderwort, is a rare and endangered plant species belonging to the family Lentibulariaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and infections. The bioactive constituents of Dortmanna thermalis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, although its use is largely limited due to its rarity and the need for further research on its efficacy and safety.
